hero.title: secured loans and credit lines for legal entities.

benefits.ltv: financing of up to 80% of collateral value
benefits.purposes: suitable for refinancing, flipping, investment, working capital and other business purposes

terms.title: competitive terms
terms.description: annual interest from 9,5% plus 6-month euribor, financing of up to 80% of the collateral value and flexible repayment terms.

process.title: efficient process
process.description: complete the application process and receive an indicative offer within two business days.

support.title: personal support
support.description: a dedicated client manager to guide the process and understand your business needs.

loans.title: loans
loans.description: loans for legal entities that need capital for refinancing, investment, property-backed projects, working capital or other business purposes.

creditLines.title: credit lines
creditLines.description: flexible pre-approved credit for legal entities that want funds available when needed. use the limit repeatedly, draw only what you need, and pay interest only on the outstanding drawn amount.

Footer.license: avs finance oü operates under financial institution licence ffa000503 granted by the financial intelligence unit of estonia.

hero.subtitle: straightforward loans for businesses that need financing for a specific purpose.
hero.description: use it for refinancing, investment, a property project or another business need, with terms structured around your plans.
hero.imageAlt: a bridge being built over water

overview.heading: loan overview
overview.subheading: transparent terms designed to support your business growth

applicant.label: applicant
applicant.value: a company, non-profit association or sole proprietor registered in estonia

ltv.label: ltv
ltv.value: up to 80% of the collateral value

collateral.label: collateral
collateral.value: mortgage on building, apartment or land in estonia; mortgage can be combined with surety

interestRate.label: interest rate
interestRate.value: from 9,5% per annum plus 6-month euribor, calculated on the outstanding loan balance

originationFee.label: origination fee
originationFee.value: from 1% to 2% of the loan amount

annuity.title: annuity schedule
annuity.description: equal monthly payments throughout the loan term. each payment includes both principal and interest.

bullet.title: bullet schedule
bullet.description: interest-only payments during the loan term with the full principal repaid at maturity.

process.heading: loan application process
process.subheading: simple and straightforward steps to get your financing
process.step2: we review the information and may contact you for clarifications. if the information is sufficient, we aim to provide an indicative offer within 48 business hours.
process.step3: if the terms are suitable, we complete the required checks and prepare the loan and security documents.
process.step4: once the documents are signed and all disbursement conditions are met, the loan is paid out.

cta.heading: ready to proceed?
cta.subheading: get started with our financing solutions today. our team is ready to help you find the suitable solution for your business.

hero.title: credit lines. funding on demand.
hero.subtitle: a flexible credit line for businesses that want financing ready to use.
hero.description: use it when needed, reuse it as you repay, and pay interest only on the amount in use.

overview.heading: credit line overview
overview.subheading: transparent terms designed to support your business growth

applicant.label: applicant
applicant.value: a company, non-profit association or sole proprietor registered in estonia

ltv.label: ltv
ltv.value: up to 75% of the collateral value

collateral.label: collateral
collateral.value: mortgage on building, apartment or land in estonia; mortgage can be combined with surety

interestRate.label: interest rate
interestRate.value: from 9,5% per annum plus 6-month euribor, calculated on the drawn credit balance

originationFee.label: origination fee
originationFee.value: from 1% to 2% of the credit line amount

commitmentFee.label: commitment fee
commitmentFee.value: 4% per annum, calculated on the undrawn credit balance

process.heading: credit line application process
process.subheading: simple and straightforward steps to get your financing
process.step2: we review the information and may contact you for clarifications. if the information is sufficient, we aim to provide an indicative offer within 48 business hours.
process.step3: if the terms are suitable, we complete the required checks and prepare the loan and security documents.
process.step4: once the documents are signed and all disbursement conditions are met, the credit line is made available for drawdowns.

cta.heading: ready to proceed?
cta.subheading: get started with our financing solutions today. our team is ready to help you find the perfect solution for your business.

websiteTerms.description: terms and conditions governing the use of the avs finance website.

dataProcessing.title: principles of customer data processing
dataProcessing.description: principles for the processing and protection of customer data.

financingTerms.title: general terms and conditions
financingTerms.description: terms and conditions applicable to financing agreements for legal entities.

cta.heading: questions about our terms?
cta.subheading: our customer support team is here to help. reach out to us with any questions or concerns.

hero.title: price list
hero.subtitle: transparent pricing for all our financial services.

PriceListPage.vatNotice: value added tax (vat) may be added to service fees in accordance with applicable law.

commitmentFee.title: credit line commitment fee
commitmentFee.price: 4% per annum on the undrawn amount

increaseCreditAmount.title: increase of the credit amount
increaseCreditAmount.price: 1% of the additional credit amount, minimum €100

paymentHoliday.title: payment holiday or restructuring due to payment difficulties

earlyRepayment.title: partial or full early repayment
earlyRepayment.price: free of charge if notice is given at least 3 months in advance; otherwise, interest calculated on the credit amount repaid early for the portion of the 3-month notice period not observed

earlyTermination.title: early termination of a credit line or reduction of a credit line limit
earlyTermination.price: free of charge if notice is given at least 3 months in advance; otherwise, a commitment fee will be charged on the reduced amount or, in the case of early termination, on the undrawn credit line balance, for the portion of the 3-month notice period not observed

otherAmendments.title: other amendments to the agreement (for example, change of term or replacement of collateral)

attendanceMortgage.title: attendance at a notarial transaction for the creation of a mortgage on entry into a new credit agreement, upon full repayment of the credit amount, or for the creation of an additional mortgage

attendanceOther.title: attendance at a notarial transaction for any other reason

reminder.title: reminder letter or debt notice
reminder.price: first free of charge, from the second onwards €10

penaltyRate.title: rate of penalty for late payment
